h1: Best Binary Heap Questions for Google
intro: A curated set of 7 Binary Heap problems frequently useful for Google interview prep. Focus on patterns, not brute memorization.

faqs.question: How many Binary Heap problems should I do for Google?
faqs.answer: Quality over quantity: master patterns with 7 well-understood problems, then expand.

faqs.question: Where should I start?
faqs.answer: Start Easy/Medium in this list, then tackle Hard variants. Pair with the Binary Heap topic page and related roadmaps.
